codex.notes: Use Codex as Hermes planning/review brain while available.

auto-ammo.notes: Gun selector. Keeps capability permissions fixed and tries provider/model ammo from config/guild/capability-adapters.json.

groq.notes: Groq OpenAI-compatible hosted worker backend. Requires GROQ_API_KEY in the environment. Do not store keys here.

openrouter.notes: Manual fallback hosted worker backend. Requires OPENROUTER_API_KEY in the local ignored provider config. Not part of the primary active set unless explicitly selected.

gemini.command: Gemini OpenAI-compatible REST API, fallback gemini --prompt
gemini.notes: Gemini worker backend. Prefer GEMINI_API_KEY/GOOGLE_API_KEY direct API; fallback to Gemini CLI only when no API key is available. Do not store keys here.

opencode.notes: Local terminal/code execution path. Must still obey allowed_files. Smoke tests showed tiny prompts still load roughly 13k input tokens.

cerebras.notes: Fast inference candidate. Do not store keys here.

local-dry-run.notes: No model call. Use for smoke tests and blocked-artifact plumbing.

invalid-output-smoke.notes: Test-only adapter that returns malformed artifact JSON so worker-agent validation can prove invalid_adapter_output handling.
